title: Phase: Installer rewrite for Bun
summary: Phase plan to rewrite the nanoclaw fresh-machine installer chain (nanoclaw.sh, setup.sh, probe.sh, TS runners, channel installers) from Node+pnpm to Bun.
scope: Bun runtime install path (macOS brew + Linux curl)
notes: Phase planning doc under docs/plan/phases/. Mixes SPEC traits (API delta table, file inventory, exit codes, test gates, implementation contracts per task) with DOC traits (rationale prose, risk/rollback). Classified SPEC because the dominant content is implementation contracts (per-file changes, status field schemas, exit codes, demo gates) the system must honor. Not ADR (no Decision/Consequences structure, no Status: Accepted). Not PRD (no user stories or acceptance criteria from user perspective).
